mentions.surface: ab eo qui mihi amicus numquam fuit

from the man who has never been my friend
Day by day now Balbus's letters to me grow more languid
is quem tu mihi commendas

summo illum in odio fuisse Caesari

the one you commend to me

At this Ligurius flew into a rage
that Quintus had been an object of the deepest hatred to Caesar
an object of the deepest hatred to Caesar
Caesar had not only favoured him but had given him a great sum of money
Pomponia, I believe, has his seal
quod istam miseram patrimonio
